properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There was a time that I was sinking down There was a time that I was dying There was a time when sin was all I've done Hopeless so lost my heart was crying

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Then my Lord came into my life Breaking my heart it's destination Then my Lord came into my life Changing my soul I'm a new creation

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: (And) I will never be the same again Lord Jesus blood has washed away my sin And He change all I was and all I am Now He's my groom and His bride I am

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I was so lost so blind I could not see All of my life all sin was wasted Doubt and unbelief was in my heart Hatred and Fear was all I tasted

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I was a brand new unit in His love When I became a new creation Now I am there to reign with Christ my King He fills my heart with his revelation
